## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Mail-IQ Version**: [e.g. 2.0.1]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.17.0]

## 📎 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem here. Logs, error messages, etc.

```
Paste error logs here
```

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for existing issues before creating this one
- [ ] I've included all required information
- [ ] I can reliably reproduce this issue
